appendixSupportNotes: Locked annual appendix basis uses FY2025 and FY2024.
Appendix rows are limited to the central statement mapping catalog on the locked annual periods; raw statement extras are never surfaced directly.
Cash-family concepts preserve the filing labels directly, and the cash-flow ending balance remains a separate concept unless the filing reports the same cash-family line on the balance sheet.
Cells marked "Not reported" mean the locked filing basis did not report the value and no governed derivation was approved for display.
Asset Turnover: Asset turnover uses average assets for each annual period only when the adjacent annual balance is available.
Shares Outstanding: Period-end shares were unavailable in the locked annual basis.
Earnings Per Share (Diluted): Earnings Per Share (Diluted) uses diluted weighted-average shares from the income statement.
Return on Assets: ROA uses average assets for each annual period only when the adjacent annual balance is available.
Return on Equity: ROE uses average equity for each annual period only when the adjacent annual balance is available.
Primary filing anchor: 10-K filed 2026-02-17.
